checks.name: Agent runs JSON detects untracked sessions
Agents pane renders manager view
checks.command: ./scripts/industrial_aux_tui.sh agents --once | tee workspace/runs/agent-work/47/validation-agents-pane.ansi | python3 -c 'import re,sys,pathlib; text=sys.stdin.read(); text=re.sub("\x1b\\[[0-9;?]*[ -/]*[@-~]", "", text); pathlib.Path("workspace/runs/agent-work/47/validation-agents-pane.txt").write_text(text); assert "AGENT PROCESSES" in text and "Running now" in text and "manual = live shell" in text and "Claude" in text and "Codex" in text and " -> " in text and "pid" not in text.lower() and "Redmine work" not in text and "REVIEW" not in text'

checks.name: Dry-run dispatch creates ledger
checks.command: python3 scripts/agent_work.py dispatch 47 --runtime codex --dry-run | tee workspace/runs/agent-work/47/validation-dispatch-dry-run.txt | grep -q 'workspace/runs/agent-runs/.*/run.json'
